case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. CALVIN DAVIS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED MAR-17-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CALVIN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, CALVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 ELLIS STREET, #12H, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $9.23 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CALVIN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CALVIN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED MAR-17-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CALVIN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CALVIN
